subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out. I'm glad to hear about the potential synergy between our teams.

I can offer the following meeting slots next week:
• Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which of these works best for you, and I'll send over the calendar invite.

Regarding your request for internal contact details, I'm not able to share our internal directory or direct contact information for our executives. For any senior-level discussions, I'm happy to facilitate the appropriate introductions through our established channels once we've had our initial call.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards
